title: Mandatory Safety & Compliance Training Videos | The Worden Standard
description: Interactive training hub for OSHA compliance, equipment certification, and hazard recognition.
intro: All new hires and active crews must complete mandatory video modules and pass the associated certification quizzes to remain compliant with State, Federal, and Worden Standard regulations.

sections.heading: OSHA 10 & 30 Compliance Overviews
sections.body: Mandatory foundational safety videos covering trenching, excavation, fall protection, and site hazard recognition. Crews cannot step foot on a job site without passing the baseline OSHA awareness modules.

sections.heading: Hazardous Materials & Silica Dust
sections.body: Specialized video modules detailing the legal requirements for handling hot asphalt emulsions, tack coat, and concrete silica dust. Includes proper usage of P100 respirators and immediate exposure reporting.

sections.heading: Heavy Equipment & Blind Spot Training
sections.body: Required viewings for all CDL Class A/B drivers and equipment operators. Modules cover loader/paver blind spots, VDOT work-zone traffic control, and FMCSA commercial fleet pre-trip inspection standards.
